metadata.description: Adversarial dataset to trigger hallucination detection and edge case handling - 100+ test cases
metadata.purpose: Test hallucination prevention, ambiguity handling, and cross-game confusion detection

categories.description: Questions about non-existent game elements to test hallucination detection

test_cases.question: In Terraforming Mars, quante volte posso usare il Will of the West?
test_cases.notes: Will of the West is an invented card name - should detect hallucination

test_cases.question: Come funziona la meccanica di terraformazione in Wingspan?
test_cases.notes: Terraforming mechanic doesn't exist in Wingspan

categories.description: Questions with multiple valid interpretations to test disambiguation

test_cases.question: Posso giocare una carta?
test_cases.notes: Too vague - should ask for clarification

categories.description: Mix elements from different games to test game context awareness

test_cases.question: In Wingspan, posso terraformare Marte?
test_cases.notes: Should detect confusion between Wingspan and Terraforming Mars

categories.description: Rare scenarios from rulebook edge cases section

test_cases.question: Cosa succede se finiscono tutti i meeple disponibili?
test_cases.notes: Edge case covered in advanced rules section

expected_behaviors.hallucination_detection: System should refuse to answer fabricated questions with low confidence
expected_behaviors.disambiguation: System should ask for clarification on ambiguous questions
expected_behaviors.cross_game_awareness: System should detect when elements from different games are mixed
expected_behaviors.edge_case_handling: System should find and cite rare scenarios from rulebook appendices
